## Type of Change
Please delete options that are not relevant and check the box that applies:

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Refactoring (code improvement without changing functionality)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Dependency update
- [ ] CI/CD pipeline update

## Checklist
Please check all applicable items:

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have run `ruff check .` and addressed all issues
- [ ] I have run `black .` to format the code
- [ ] I have run `isort .` to sort imports

### Testing
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have tested on actual hardware (if hardware-related changes)

### Documentation
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] I have updated the README.md if needed
- [ ] I have added docstrings to new functions/classes
- [ ] I have updated type hints where applicable

### Breaking Changes
- [ ] This PR introduces breaking changes
- [ ] I have documented all breaking changes in the description above
- [ ] I have updated the migration guide (if applicable)
